diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers kept the same partially_supported label and relied on the same core evidentiary logic: evidence-003 supports the claim only by inference from a successful skill-fit outcome, not by an explicit statement of a prioritization rule. Option 2 adds evidence-004 ('hiring_plan') as supplementary context and adds 'unsupported_detail' to make explicit that the policy-level prioritization detail is not directly stated. That makes the difference mainly one of granularity rather than conflicting interpretation. Option 1 is sufficient because evidence-003 alone can justify partial support via bridging inference, but option 2 is somewhat more diagnostically complete in both citations and reasons because it pairs the positive skill-fit evidence with an explicit statement that the claimed prioritization policy remains unstated.
